warnings: DeprecationWarning: dicke_state_circuit(circuit, ...) (in-place form) is deprecated. It will be removed in uniqc 0.1.0; use `the fragment form `dicke_state_circuit(n_qubits, ...) -> Circuit` with `circuit.add_circuit(fragment)`` instead. (dicke_state.py:119)
